creator: torfinn.ingolfsen@broadpark.no
text:
Scannning with gscan2pdf 0.7.2 works great. Saving inn tiff format also works. However, when I try to save as pdf 
AND select jpeg compression, I get the following error message in the shell from which I started gscan2pdf:
*** unhandled exception in callback:
***   Undefined subroutine &main::get_value called at /usr/local/bin/gscan2pdf line 889.
***  ignoring at /usr/local/bin/gscan2pdf line 416.

if I select zip compression, saving as PDF works.
I don't know id the error is with gscan2pdf itself, or some problem with the port.

Fix: 

none known to submitter.
How-To-Repeat: 

1) start gscan2pdf from a shell window
2) scan a sheet with gscan2pdf
3) select save as PDF, select jpeg compression
4) see the error message in the shell window
